properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v3 v5 v6 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Were creation suddenly articulate With a thousand tongues to lift one cry Then from north to south and east to west We'd hear'Christ be magnified! '

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Were the whole earth echoing His eminence His name would burst from sea and sky From rivers to the mountain tops We'd hear'Christ be magnified! '

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: O! Christ be magnified! Let His praise arise Christ be magnified in me O! Christ be magnified! From the altar of my life Christ be magnified in me

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: When every creature finds its inmost melody And every human heart its native cry O then in one enraptured hymn of praise We'll sing'Christ be magnified! ' O be lifted high, Jesus

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I won't bow to idols, I'll stand strong and worship You And if it puts me through the fire, I'll rejoice'cause You're there too I won't be formed by feelings, I hold fast to what is true If the cross brings transformation, Then I'll be crucified with You

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: 'Cause death is just the doorway into resurrection life And if I join You in Your suffering then I'll join You when You rise And when You return in glory with all the angels and the saints My heart will still be singing and my song will be the same
